title: Better Combat X Caverns & Chasms Compat
description: Adds Compatibility Between Better Combat And Caverns & Chasms
body:
![Header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cae3170139adf926919294026728913f3e4e951e.png)

**Allows the Kunai from the mod Caverns and Chasms to use Better Combat Animations**

**All Credit Goes To The Makers Of These Mods I Just Made A Simple Data Pack.**

Forge Only, Should Work On All Versions Required Mods Are Available.
---

**Required Mods:**
- Better Combat
- Cloth Config API
- playerAnimator
- Caverns & Chasms
- Blueprint  

**Recommended Mods**

- Global Packs **(If Being Used Transfer The Downloaded File To Resource Pack Folder For A Simpler Process)**
